items.text: Conduct a public hearing and consider making a recommendation to City Council regarding a rezoning of the property legally described as First State Addition Lot C from Heavy
Council regarding a rezoning of the property legally described as First [CONTINUED]

Analysis: The Comprehensive Plan/Future Land Use Map identifies the subject property as being located within the Place Focused Commercial development pattern. Characteristics of this development pattern include providing minor level density, scale, and a mix of uses. Such uses include a blend of dining, shopping, entertainment, and social gathering spaces. It is not believed that a massage salon would complement adjacent retail and shopping uses within the shopping center.
Comprehensive Plan in providing a variety of dining, entertainment, or retail uses to the overall site; and

items.text: Consider and make a recommendation to Town Council on a Major Final Plat for the Knights [PASSED 4-0]
Director Wicks provided a presentation on the item. The Commission discussed the item and considered the final plat.
Commissioner Lewis motioned to recommend approval to Town Council for a Major Final Plat for the Knights Ridge private subdivision, as presented. Commissioner Miersma seconded the motion.

sfr_items.text: Commissioner Lewis motioned to recommend approval to Town Council for a Major Final Plat for the Knights Ridge private subdivision, as presented. Commissioner Miersma seconded the motion.

items.text: During the previous MDD meeting on April 7, 2026, Jeremy Blad with Valley Quest Design provided a presentation on a draft version of the Front Street Small Area Plan. Notable comments included clarification on the names of historic buildings in the area, the proximity of the train tracks, the location of a proposed you-pick farm, and future zoning change requirements. Exhibit A is the final version of the small area plan ready for consideration and approval by the MDD.
